chapter_context.summary: The 'mystery of Christ' revealed: that Gentiles are fellow heirs. Paul's prayer for inner strength and the knowledge of Christ's love.

outline.explanation: This section focuses on The Mystery of the Gospel (3:1-13), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Ephesians.
This section focuses on Paul's Prayer for Strength (3:14-21), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Ephesians.

1.commentary:
### Tyndale Study Notes
**Section Context: The Mystery of the Gospel**
This verse in Ephesians 3 unveils the profound spiritual riches and practical responsibilities of the believer in Christ.
1.full_commentary:
### Matthew Henry Commentary
Matthew Henry provides devotional reflections on the 'unsearchable riches of Christ' found in this passage.

### Jamieson-Fausset-Brown
JFB commentary analyzes the sublime theological language Paul uses to describe the believer's union with Christ.

key_themes.title: Spiritual Blessings in Christ
key_themes.description: The riches of God's grace bestowed upon believers.

key_themes.title: Unity of the Body
key_themes.description: One Lord, one faith, one baptism.

key_themes.title: The Armor of God
key_themes.description: Spiritual protection for the believer's battle.

devotional.question: How does understanding your 'spiritual blessings' in Christ change your perspective on daily challenges?

cultural_historical.title: The City of Ephesus
cultural_historical.text: Ephesus was a major Roman city and home to the Temple of Artemis, making Paul's teachings on spiritual warfare and the true Temple particularly relevant.
